name: FeatureUUID branded type
description: Branded FeatureUUID type: FeatureUUID = string & { readonly __brand: 'FeatureUUID' } prevents passing MapLibre vector tile integer IDs (as strings) where database UUIDs are expected. toFeatureUUID() validates UUID regex and returns branded or null; isFeatureUUID() is the type guard. Lives in packages/shared-types/src/branded.ts, exported from index.ts.

name: shared-types-deep-drill-l5-l6
description: Deep drill L5+L6: 43 Zod schemas across 11 modules, 19 z.infer types, 1 branded type. 3 consumers (web, worker, import-engine). Critical gap: Redis boundary (ImportJobPayload) has NO runtime validation. See docs/architecture/subsystems/shared-types/
